notes: PROGRES is Algeria's national higher-education (MESRS) platform. The adaptor exposes a single operation, postData, doing a mutual-TLS POST (client key+cert via agentOptions) with an Ocp-Apim-Subscription-Key header to an Azure API Management endpoint. No public vendor machine spec or REST docs exist (the platform is access-controlled). Synthesized a minimal OpenAPI 3.0 from the adaptor surface: a generic /data submission endpoint plus representative student/enrollment submission paths and a generic acknowledgement response. Server URL and paths are placeholders; the real target URL is supplied per-call.
